title: Operations Executive (Inbound Travel – Group / FIT)
description:
Company Overview

LUXURY TOURS & TRAVEL PTE LTD

Job Summary

You will manage inbound group and FIT (Free Independent Traveller) travel arrangements, coordinate with agents and suppliers, handle operational changes, and support on-ground activities to ensure smooth and seamless travel experiences.

Responsibilities

  • Arrange inbound group tours by booking hotels, transport, meals, sightseeing, and tour guides to meet client requirements
  • Liaise with overseas agents and local suppliers to confirm bookings and secure timely service delivery
  • Prepare accurate tour documents including vouchers, rooming lists, and final itineraries for group tours
  • Manage amendments, special requests, and last-minute operational changes to maintain service quality
  • Assist on-ground during group arrivals, departures, or key events to ensure smooth coordination and customer satisfaction
  • Coordinate with tour leaders and guides to facilitate seamless tour execution and resolve issues promptly
  • Oversee daily inbound FIT operations by coordinating travel arrangements and confirming services with transport providers and driver-guides
  • Operate the company’s 24/7 hotline during guest stays to provide timely support and resolve inquiries or issues
  • Monitor booking status and supplier performance to maintain service quality and cost efficiency
  • Develop and improve operational procedures to enhance productivity and service standards
  • Ensure compliance with company policies and industry best practices in all operations
  • Identify operational gaps and propose practical solutions to improve processes and customer experience
  • Collaborate with internal teams and overseas agents to deliver seamless travel experiences
  • Prepare regular operational reports and provide insights for continuous improvement
  • Perform ad-hoc duties and provide support during peak periods as assigned
  • Commit to working on weekends and public holidays as part of shift work requirements

Required competencies and certifications

  • Commitment to weekend and public holiday shift work.
  • Ability to manage and operate a night hotline.

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • 1-3 years of experience in logistics management and operations management
  • Strong knowledge of logistics and operations processes to support travel arrangements and service delivery
  • Proficiency in timeline management to ensure timely delivery of services
  • Excellent organizational skills to handle multiple tasks and maintain accuracy
  • Strong problem-solving skills to address operational challenges and improve processes
  • Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment
  • Strong attention to detail and accuracy in preparing documents and managing bookings
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to liaise with agents, suppliers, and team members
  • Proficiency in MS Office Suite and other relevant software applications
  • Entry-level candidates or those new to the workforce with the right attitude will also be considered
